bus_matrix.value: ST7789 display uses an 8-bit parallel bus: D0-D7=GPIO39/40/41/42/45/46/47/48, CS=GPIO6, DC=GPIO7, RST=GPIO5, WR=GPIO8, RD=GPIO9
bus_matrix.claim: Display bus and control pins are taken from the official TFT_eSPI Setup206 header

peripheral_table.claim: The official TFT_eSPI Setup206 header selects ST7789 and defines a 170 x 320 panel

peripheral_table.value: 8-bit parallel display bus with D0-D7 on GPIO39/40/41/42/45/46/47/48 and control pins CS=6, DC=7, RST=5, WR=8, RD=9
peripheral_table.claim: The official TFT_eSPI Setup206 header defines the display interface and GPIO mapping
Backlight and screen power GPIOs are taken from official factory pin config

peripheral_table.value: 170x320 panel; factory LVGL config uses horizontal=320 and vertical=170 orientation
peripheral_table.claim: Display resolution is source-backed by official setup and factory pin config
